subject: Accounting
title: Tesla's Path to Profitability
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Tesla's Path to Profitability.

hook.text: For years, Tesla reported losses. But its cash flow statement told a different story.

buildup.text: Massive capital spending on factories meant the income statement looked terrible.

discovery.text: Investors who read the cash flow statement saw operating cash flow turning positive in 2018.

twist.text: Tesla also generated cash by selling regulatory credits to competitors—a hidden revenue line.

climax.text: By 2020, Tesla was consistently profitable. Those who read carefully were invested early.

punchline.text: The income statement lied. The cash flow told the truth.

quiz.question: What hidden revenue source boosted Tesla's finances?
